pkgmetadata.longdescription:
Archestra is an enterprise AI platform for managing and orchestrating Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers. This package installs the migration kit — a set of zero-dependency Python scripts that help migrate existing AI pilots (Claude Code projects, custom MCP servers) into the Archestra platform.
The migration kit scans existing project structures, generates a secret-redacted inventory, and applies migration plans to an Archestra instance. The full platform (backend, frontend, database, Kubernetes orchestrator) is available as a Docker container at docker.io/archestra/platform.
